psalm-84-1.verse:
How lovely are Your dwelling places,
  O Lord of hosts!
psalm-84-1.prayer: Lord, how lovely is Your dwelling place. Help me treasure Your presence above every comfort, achievement, or desire.

psalm-84-2.verse:
My soul longed and even yearned for the courts of the Lord;
  My heart and my flesh sing for joy to the living God.
psalm-84-2.prayer: Father, let my soul long for You with sincere devotion. May my heart and life cry out for the living God.

psalm-84-3.verse:
The bird also has found a house,
  And the swallow a nest for herself, where she may lay her young,
  Even Your altars, O Lord of hosts,
  My King and my God.
psalm-84-3.prayer: Lord, thank You that there is room near You for the weak, the small, and the weary. Let my heart find home in Your presence.

psalm-84-4.verse:
How blessed are those who dwell in Your house!
  They are ever praising You. Selah.
psalm-84-4.prayer: Father, blessed are those who dwell with You and continually praise Your name. Teach me to live a life of worship.

psalm-84-5.verse:
How blessed is the man whose strength is in You,
  In whose heart are the highways to Zion!
psalm-84-5.prayer: Lord, bless me with strength that comes from You. Set my heart on the path that leads closer to Your presence.

psalm-84-6.verse:
Passing through the valley of Baca they make it a spring;
  The early rain also covers it with blessings.
psalm-84-6.prayer: Father, when I pass through dry or difficult places, turn them into places of blessing, growth, and renewed hope.

psalm-84-7.verse:
They go from strength to strength,
  Every one of them appears before God in Zion.
psalm-84-7.prayer: Lord, lead me from strength to strength. Help me keep moving forward in faith until I stand before You.

psalm-84-8.verse:
O Lord God of hosts, hear my prayer;
  Give ear, O God of Jacob! Selah.
psalm-84-8.prayer: Father, hear my prayer and listen with mercy. Thank You that I can call upon You with confidence.

psalm-84-9.verse:
Behold our shield, O God,
  And look upon the face of Your anointed.
psalm-84-9.prayer: Lord, look upon my life with grace. Cover me with Your favor and keep me close to Your anointed purpose.

psalm-84-10.verse:
For a day in Your courts is better than a thousand outside.
  I would rather stand at the threshold of the house of my God
  Than dwell in the tents of wickedness.
psalm-84-10.prayer: Father, one day in Your presence is better than a thousand elsewhere. Help me value nearness to You above everything this world offers.

psalm-84-11.prayer: Lord, You are my sun and shield. Thank You for giving grace, glory, protection, and every good thing according to Your will.

psalm-84-12.verse:
O Lord of hosts,
  How blessed is the man who trusts in You!
psalm-84-12.prayer: Father, blessed is the one who trusts in You. Strengthen my trust and help me rest securely in Your goodness.

psalm-84-closing.verse:
Lord, thank You for the beauty, safety, and joy of Your presence. Teach me to long for You above all else and to walk from strength to strength by Your grace. Turn dry valleys into places of blessing, guard me as my sun and shield, and help me trust You with all my heart. May my life remain rooted in worship, gratitude, and nearness to You.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
psalm-84-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for the beauty, safety, and joy of Your presence. Teach me to long for You above all else and to walk from strength to strength by Your grace. Turn dry valleys into places of blessing, guard me as my sun and shield, and help me trust You with all my heart. May my life remain rooted in worship, gratitude, and nearness to You.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
